name: Haunt — Web Extraction for AI Agents
description: Web extraction MCP for AI agents. Turn permitted public URLs into clean JSON or markdown; clear failure states for blocked/login/CAPTCHA pages instead of fabricated data.

tools.name: try_demo_extract
tools.description: No-key demo tool for checking Haunt output and setup links without using credits.

tools.name: extract
tools.description: Extract structured JSON or markdown from permitted public web pages using a URL and plain-English prompt.
